title: Full study title
main_findings: Writing about difficult experiences may support emotional processing over time.
allowed_inferences: Private writing can help name emotions and organize subjective experience.
prompt_guidance: Encourage naming emotions rather than interpreting pathology.
Prefer gentle hypotheses over strong causal claims.
example_questions: What part of this experience seems to keep returning?
Which emotion is easiest to name here?
notes: Human-reviewed card. Safe for runtime only after validation.
